params.title: Component parameters
params.description: Parameters of the Positon component class - 'x', 'y', 'tile_x', 'tile_y', 'map', 'dir_name'. Coordinates (x or tile_x) and (y or tile_y) together with the map should be specified.

x.title: X-axis position
x.description: X-axis position in pixels on the map.

tile_x.title: X-axis position in tiles
tile_x.description: X-axis position in tiles on the map.

y.title: Y-axis position
y.description: Y-axis position in pixels on the map.

tile_y.title: Y-axis position in tiles
tile_y.description: Y-axis position in tiles on the map.

map.title: Map name
map.description: Name of the map where entity is present.

dir_name.title: Direction name
dir_name.description: Name of the direction where entity is heading.

cond_coords_required.description: One of duo 'x', 'tile_x' or 'y', 'tile_y' must be always defined.

cond_either_x_or_tile_x_required.description: Either 'x' or 'tile_x' parameter must be present.

cond_either_y_or_tile_y_required.description: Either 'y' or 'tile_y' parameter must be present.
